name: The White House
subject: An inside look at hosting a State Visit
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc347608a99fe4a3f309b0ebf5eb9e93183d7dceecf4a4a4977120d8ae968b75ded2289028713b8053d17c296c58b9230332517a1aa12405) The White House • April 23, 2018
## Driving the Day
President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump welcome French President Emmanuel Macron and his wife, Mrs. Brigitte Macron, to Washington today. The First Couples will visit Mount Vernon tonight before France’s official State Visit begins tomorrow.

---
|

## An inside look at hosting a State Visit
**State Dinners with foreign leaders date back to 1874**. When King David Kalakaua of the Kingdom of Hawaii (later annexed by the United States) visited Washington that year, there was no guide for how President Ulysses S. Grant should welcome him. No matter how the visit went, it would set a precedent.
**The result was a tradition that continues to this day**. President Trump hosts the first official State Visit of his Administration when President Macron and Mrs. Macron of France come to the White House. While President Trump has hosted numerous foreign leaders, tomorrow will mark the first ceremonial State Visit among them.
**State Visits are intricately planned to show respect for a visiting leader**. The end goal of such events is practical. Just as negotiations over trade drove King Kalakaua to the White House nearly a century and a half ago, better trade deals will be a fixture of the conversations between Presidents Trump and Macron this week.
[Learn more about what goes into hosting an official State Visit. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc347608a99fe4a3f320777ba8d04ef9e741df0ce95b352a70bdfa683b6b401e72850145dcf755bf34b8e54bbf9652a026767e0147aa07d1)
**More** : [Watch as the First Lady prepares for France’s State Visit.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc347608a99fe4a3b80f22c2764070b83bfa174e1a5dc2dfdf7ee73e0f357eba1aa8d7e1f5f6843283f9bf1a4077a778783286391cf5e6bc)

---
|

## Senate prepares to vote on Mike Pompeo
**Mike Pompeo is the Secretary of State America needs**. Last year, the Senate voted 66-32 to confirm Pompeo as Director of the Central Intelligence Agency, and the full Senate is expected to approve his nomination for Secretary of State in the coming weeks. He has served the CIA with distinction for the past 14 months.
**His nomination is earning widespread support**. “Mike Pompeo has the intelligence, the integrity, and the experience to serve as America’s secretary of State,” Sen. John Barrasso (R-WY) wrote last week. “We would be hard-pressed to find a nominee with greater experience and expertise,” national security expert Michael Allen says.
**Director Pompeo’s record speaks for itself**. He was a leader long before he arrived in Washington, patrolling the Iron Curtain as a U.S. Cavalry officer in West Germany before the Berlin Wall fell. He has been an entrepreneur, a Congressman, and first in his class at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point. He’s ready.
See [why Mike Pompeo is ready to lead](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc347608a99fe4a3c0d6d23cac629ded19ec6d7aae062efe1ec89e267f2b2b446db2f04357a392d5f3cd1629dd87f069812f4a79ea6f96eb) and [what others are saying](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc347608a99fe4a344bc8c750904109ebc174ee7eb7a3f2081741035a62e2e0cbb7c17c835de684e83ab967183d0b13936313df184c78d62) about his nomination.

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump with officers from the Palm Beach County Sheriff’s Office** | April 22, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc347608a99fe4a3255d14ea4f62c9a58dc6117b40350f196eb5972592d94d20ca89f096c4468f201eee10f51997cf555ab81f796734ac13) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=cc347608a99fe4a3549b9635e6ba43968909d3e631085a19470eb4f7aa1a926402996a9bf78bdb5e5f089e13678405fed0311da595d4403a) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d404f34c56ef968c2e59b15c446dcabb03c2640989035149cddf07be42b3882a586fe34d88abdfdbbd76b8d4491e08f85b52a4b804e2471aa7)
---

Team --
When Donald Trump's FCC voted to repeal net neutrality protections last year, it endangered the fair, free, and open Internet as we know it.
As a result of that vote, net neutrality protections will expire TODAY, and we're one vote short of reinstating these critical protections.
We need to apply grassroots pressure to swing one more Republican to defend net neutrality - and that means we need 5,000 signatures in the next few hours.
[**Please put your name down to call on Congress to protect the free and open Internet and save net neutrality.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf6b/2a380d31/b57faee/f1f1e2/1777147127/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/netneutralityja/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_netneut_up%3Frefcode%3De20180422_netneut_up")
Without the votes for this resolution, the FCC will allow Internet service providers to block or slow down certain websites and create high-speed "fast lanes" -- all so they can charge more money for fast Internet and police the content you access.
**Net neutrality protections expire today, so we have to act fast.[Please click here to sign our petition calling in Republicans to protect the Internet as we know it.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdf6b/2a380d31/b57faee/f1f1e2/1777147127/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/netneutralityja/?code=hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_netneut_up%3Frefcode%3De20180422_netneut_up")**
Thank you,
Team Maggie

[**1\. It demonstrated to me two fundamental truths about our government: **it 's time to stop talking and start listening; and every successful Conservative movement starts from the ground up. **
[**Let 's Set the Conservative Agenda!**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MTEzLWU5NzAwZWMyYjczZjRmMmY5Y2UxMWY1MDBhZTJjMmYy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3ASHlwZXJsaW5rXzIwMTgwNDEyXzEwNTgxOTE0MQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9hY3Quc3RldmVzY2FsaXNlLmNvbS9hZHZpY2Utc3VydmV5LTMvP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1BRSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAxODA0MjNfU3RldmVTY2FsaXNlX0FFLUdPUDM&K=9JCISJEXUsdbz5paAglJfQ)

So what's our next move?

body:
The countdown is on! We're now less than two months away from the 2018 Indiana Republican State Convention (June 8-9). Last week, we told you about... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/just-announced-big-convention-news?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **Just Announced: **
Hunter Smith Band Performing at #INDGOP18 Friday Night Party!
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ed1e6243e2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Friends -

The countdown is on! We're now just weeks away from the [2018 Indiana Republican State Convention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d6b6cfe7f0&e=1acd9bb3d6) (June 8-9). Earlier this month, we told you about the big party we have planned for the Friday night of convention -- including live music, great food, and special appearances from top Indiana Republican elected officials!

**And today we're excited to announce that the Hunter Smith Band will be performing at our #INDGOP18 Friday Night Party at the Ford Center on June 8! **

You've probably heard of Hunter Smith, the former punter for the Indianapolis Colts. But you might not know that he's also the front man for this Indiana-based, high-energy band! [The Hunter Smith Band](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=276775c57f&e=1acd9bb3d6) plays a great mix of country, pop, rock and alternative music, and it's guaranteed to get you fired up for our convention and our 2018 election season!

I wouldn't want you to miss out on the great party we have planned, so let us know now if [you're interested in filling one of a limited number of delegate spots](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=90754967a5&e=1acd9bb3d6) remaining to state convention. And once you're confirmed as a delegate, make sure you don't miss out by:
* [Paying your delegate fee](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c7b00fb418&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* [Reserving your hotel room in Evansville for Friday night](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8edffeddf7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
* [Keeping up-to-date with the latest convention details](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b60abc98c7&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**Republicans are going to take over Evansville for state convention, with more than 370 hotel rooms already sold! Make sure you claim your[special discounted room](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a1cd909c50&e=1acd9bb3d6) at either the Courtyard by Marriott Evansville East or the Hilton Garden Inn Evansville before these rooms sell out!**

We can't wait to get the party started on Friday, June 8 with the Hunter Smith Band! I hope to see you there!

-Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Our first ad
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30fe/9e00690/4456c9dd/24026746/3192699170/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG")
Friend --

We've been on this journey together for more than a year, sharing our story of why someone born into a regular, working-class Florida family needs to be our next Governor.

I don't have a famous last name, and I can't stroke my own six-figure check. I've never needed a "workday" or a briefing memo to tell me what it's like to grow up in poverty -- or how to survive and thrive in Florida.

That's why our first digital ad isn't about who we're against -- it's about who we are fighting for, and the kind of state we must become.
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30fe/9e00690/4456c9dd/24026759/3192699170/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-april-digital-ad?gpsid=13_55_11&refcode=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2") **[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30fe/9e00690/4456c9dd/24026758/3192699170/VEsF/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//www.facebook.com/andrewgillumfl/posts/10155235447761021&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=3+-+SHARE+ON+FACEBOOK&utm_campaign=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG")** | | **[TWEET NOW](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30fe/9e00690/4456c9dd/2402675b/3192699170/VEsC/ "https://twitter.com/home?status=Check%20out%20%40AndrewGillum's%20new%20video%20%3E%3E%20https%3A//twitter.com/AndrewGillum/status/988404025484873729&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=4+-+TWEET+NOW&utm_campaign=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&source=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG")**
---|---|---
This story is a story that too many Floridians know -- struggling to make ends meet and finally breaking a cycle of intergenerational poverty through a good public education and good jobs.

I'm running for Governor because we need someone in the Governor's Mansion who has lived that experience -- and will create the opportunity for millions of our family, friends, and neighbors from Pensacola to South Miami-Dade.

**[I hope you like our video -- share it today.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30fe/9e00690/4456c9dd/2402675a/3192699170/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-april-digital-ad?gpsid=13_55_11&refcode=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=5+-+I+hope+you+like+our+video++share+it+toda")**

Bring it home,

Andrew

**[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30fe/9e00690/4456c9dd/2402675d/3192699170/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-april-digital-ad?gpsid=13_55_11&refcode=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&utm_campaign=em18_180423_AdVid_gq_act__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agilP&utm_content=6+-+DONATE")**

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? name: Joseline Mata
subject: Add your name → Commit to vote today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
The Democratic Party hasn't always done enough to engage or empower young voters, Derek. As the president of College Democrats of America, I can tell tha
---
The Democratic Party hasn't always done enough to engage or empower young voters, Derek. As the president of College Democrats of America, I can tell you that's changing.

The DNC is making an unprecedented effort to build new tools and tech to reach young voters where they are whether that's a college campus or on social media. They're also creating long-term infrastructure with organizations like ours so young voters support Democrats over the long haul.

It's working so far -- millions of people my age plan to vote this year. But we need your help if Democrats are going to win in all 50 states.

**College Democrats is partnering with the DNC to reach out to 50 million voters and help get them to the polls. Add your name right now to say you will commit to vote this fall.**

[ I WILL VOTE](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522abd/4067b0a/5e4d40df3/7e434610/1539062872/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/IWillVote?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+I+WILL+VOTE&utm_campaign=em_20180423_jm_nd&source=em_20180423_jm_nd")
The Democratic Party has a huge opportunity with young voters this fall. Many of us, including me, weren't old enough to vote for President Obama, and we're fired up to have a chance to shape the future of our country.

Young people are already helping flip seats from red to blue. Nearly 60 percent of young Alabamians voted for Doug Jones -- and Ralph Northam won 72 percent of votes near Virginia college campuses. We have to keep it up.

**I hope that our voices and our stories will continue to inspire others to get involved in our democracy and turn out to vote this year -- including you, Derek.**

**[Add your name today to say you are committed to voting this fall.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522abd/4067b0a/5e4d40df3/7e434611/1539062872/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/IWillVote?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+today+to+say+you+are+commi&utm_campaign=em_20180423_jm_nd&source=em_20180423_jm_nd")**

Thanks,

Joseline

Joseline Mata
President, College Democrats of America
University of Arizona '18

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www.Democrats.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522abd/4067b0a/5e4d40df3/7e43461f/1539062872/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180423_jm_nd&source=em_20180423_jm_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522abd/4067b0a/5e4d40df3/7e43461c/1539062872/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180423_jm_nd&source=em_20180423_jm_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522abd/4067b0a/5e4d40df3/7e43461d/1539062872/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180423_jm_nd&source=em_20180423_jm_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

body:
You might not know this about me, but I am fired up about healthcare. Seeing firsthand the devastating effects Obamacare has had on our economy... | | |
---|---|---
|
---
**[>> I support the Trump-Pence plan to repeal and replace Obamacare and I will fight in Congress to fix this problem – Watch this week’s video here <<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=dadebf2e23624d838b497c90672bb6d6&_e=D7-yDdnhPFbuOlps0zu3iP8u3PwrHugRWl6noQumryKVQ8VHhGfhv9Czpk1cArkvi5Gt0XmV31hej9OlZrci5rmEh8WpATApr4UPgb30kScZOsHS6sGXqrzvod0_VEa4qg0tto2x_c_CO_9F2SbRPlKbnYqbVDoDbw4VE2XDQDq6UrljGHEYEd-2FQSG9kxMQyoHNNltm5--XZF_HGhlmltma4zfWjMIQrFhIa24DSJfsFAQ3u5aF56J9I-dnxkbZueWImrpadhtePI8XNkcg52Vx887jdbSkpjTw-U1n98cYqEfspt4BLyN7sHp9vLvPhTbrO3AOrQ-gP-VVa2Ch7umz9jnKfpVzj5VWKmQFKzIBz9JCjTnrA7fqLZ5Y4RFXYQSJf1FU82IG6_UxmbXdPjioz_36U93Yc7rtZadkU2wCF8X6PhtNuY-UWaGFJqw)**

_You might not know this about me, but I am fired up about healthcare._

Seeing firsthand the devastating effects Obamacare has had on our economy, wages, jobs, and families right here in the 6th District is one of the reasons I decided to run for Congress.

In this week’s video, I discuss my frustration with Obamacare and my thoughts on how to fix it with my friend and award-winning radio broadcaster, Greg Garrison.

**[>> Let’s REALLY get rid of Obamacare. Watch this week’s new video now <<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=dadebf2e23624d838b497c90672bb6d6&_e=D7-yDdnhPFbuOlps0zu3iP8u3PwrHugRWl6noQumryKVQ8VHhGfhv9Czpk1cArkvi5Gt0XmV31hej9OlZrci5rmEh8WpATApr4UPgb30kScZOsHS6sGXqrzvod0_VEa4qg0tto2x_c_CO_9F2SbRPlKbnYqbVDoDbw4VE2XDQDq6UrljGHEYEd-2FQSG9kxMQyoHNNltm5--XZF_HGhlmltma4zfWjMIQrFhIa24DSK-q9dBxQHcV1yn7M7bg4dsmv2IuEcH7EPDMIMqPX0AbrsTMbxwDbYHVdaLZSuPllIX1feZSz9gMcIfAjdRqgkQG6-u9NOV7Yfp2bTraWoyFWGgMmbxwHmOSdxqo4LYMx7Zb7xKVBZKFJg0TpkJpAfDfqNR6VNA4depwdzzxmZL5uiviBNkuFO92Kt9hWT-e2iztdvLMm1n48Cgz8DYcPpY)**

[ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=dadebf2e23624d838b497c90672bb6d6&_e=D7-yDdnhPFbuOlps0zu3iP8u3PwrHugRWl6noQumryKVQ8VHhGfhv9Czpk1cArkvi5Gt0XmV31hej9OlZrci5rmEh8WpATApr4UPgb30kScZOsHS6sGXqrzvod0_VEa4qg0tto2x_c_CO_9F2SbRPlKbnYqbVDoDbw4VE2XDQDq6UrljGHEYEd-2FQSG9kxMQyoHNNltm5--XZF_HGhlmltma4zfWjMIQrFhIa24DSLRxnDZgCTVLpj2Idb74rk-a5AyMB3_YlEa3hHWOlftDNYXfBItOD9Z3by5VwVRPIRU1u0Hj4ukJHZ5Fe-6zLSLZEUphExz28P9DfCwYiYwyQCmEHZ1njzxut6pWj4xdLW989pGNJpaCdIi_cA_lGB56imsywx4sDLaKx54QnAOKNLirbHHupTPjAfR_97u8_ywPzPwGVAv3WA693bkjkHu)
**There really is no such thing as the “Affordable” Care Act. Obamacare is an attack against the middle class and small businesses, the lifeblood of our economy.**

I believe President Donald Trump needs critical reinforcements in Washington, D.C. to get his bold economic agenda through Congress, and with more and more insurers being driven out of our state, it’s clear that **Obamacare has to go.**

_As your Congressman, I won’t sit idly by while this issue continues to burden the people of Indiana. From Day One, I will make it a priority to fight alongside the Trump administration to**get rid of Obamacare once and for all and replace it with a plan that benefits all Hoosiers.**_

**[We’re just 2 weeks away from the May 8 Primary. Join Team Pence to help President Trump & Vice President Pence fix healthcare >>](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=dadebf2e23624d838b497c90672bb6d6&_e=D7-yDdnhPFbuOlps0zu3iFaqBSQ_UkM9FonrPOZP1j7fx5JMm-INFWPq7Mm-xzZJcDJ1Oll3eVelT5PJJevpNftTa4LGiEMpSWrxpz8MjXHV9crozHGIPLdY5jT0yamDZBD9Qwj0hQLgR4MBmVtBjd_sPrzHgCG8TBBX1m5I2zmXPFJx8wEWHasrxUnEy9IFUQZCY0SEx0amBhbGUQL0_dANZOalpsBHMGkKjEleSia4koin0ytUARhmfYQi4H_A8xQTMiVyBws7YkAf14DpggmGDa_Wnq4Q-hL0EUFIeC5kQks_cwNIfVn8hH_gsF18N1jD3UgsJ1Z5NXdr-E8juAB0J93-Y04LtEG6aCgNhBwnUyk1AhYIvrzu4U6U8JiUN2mtDK4VR8OgIsgdGwIIOah2kqgqt2QFMucRGWMT4b4%3D)**

I am Ready to Serve, Again!

Greg

I believe President Donald Trump needs critical reinforcements in Washington, D.C. to get his bold economic agenda through Congress, and with more and more insurers being driven out of our state, it’s clear that Obamacare has to go. As your Congressman, I won’t sit idly by while this issue continues to burden the people of Indiana. From Day One, I will make it a priority to fight alongside the Trump administration toget rid of Obamacare once and for all and replace it with a plan that benefits all Hoosiers. I am Ready to Serve, Again! Greg | | | Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress | | PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| | Peter --

You get a lot of emails from us. But we aren't sending them for our health. We're sending them because we've got a really tough race on our hands -- websites like _Politico_ have called Joe the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the country.

We're sending them because if we fail to hit our goals, we have to start cutting pieces of our campaign plan. And cutting pieces could mean falling short in November.

This is already an incredibly frugal campaign, but the race for Indiana's Senate seat is going to be one of the most expensive in the country. If we want to win, _we can 't afford to cut anything_ \-- not from our voter contact program or our ad budget, not the offices we'll be rolling out across the state or our staff and organizers on the ground.

That's why we're reaching out now. With your help, we can fund our fight the right way. **Will you pitch in today to help keep our campaign running full steam ahead?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
